clues.clue: Output of sewer covers wide area with wee mostly

Ready, a cover when pulled back opens up

competition.prizeinfo: A £20 Waterstones voucher will be awarded for the first five randomly selected correct solutions. To enter, complete the crossword and submit your entry. 18+ only. Closing date is midnight on the first Wednesday after publication. Full T&Cs apply. Printed entries can be sent to: The Times Crossword 29514, PO Box 2164, Colchester, Essex CO2 8LJ.
